title: McCaffrey held out of practice again with Achilles soreness
summary: The 49ers RB has been limited in three straight practices, raising concern about his workload heading into the season.

title: Daniels dazzles in offseason workouts, praised as top-5 fantasy QB
summary: Analysts are buzzing about Daniels' improved deep-ball accuracy and expanded rushing role in year two.

title: Hill addresses trade rumors, says he wants to finish career in Miami
summary: Speculation about a possible trade cooled after Hill's comments to reporters this week.

title: Henry showing no signs of slowing down at age 32, per beat reporters
summary: Ravens coaches praised Henry's conditioning and explosiveness heading into camp.

title: Bowers named a breakout candidate after dominant second half of 2025
summary: Reddit fantasy football consensus has Bowers rising into TE1 conversations for 2026 drafts.

title: Rookie RB Marcus Feldman turning heads in OTAs
summary: The Ohio State product looks the part early, but faces a crowded backfield battle for touches.

title: Burrow fully cleared, no restrictions entering training camp
summary: Bengals staff confirmed Burrow is at 100% and expected to handle a full offseason workload for the first time in years.

title: Pickens' attitude questioned again after sideline dust-up in preseason
summary: Coaches downplayed the incident, but it continues a pattern of concern about locker room fit.

title: Rookie WR Devon Whitfield impressing in camp with elite route running
summary: Bears coaching staff has hinted at an expanded role sooner than expected for the rookie.

title: Herbert dealing with minor finger injury, not considered serious
summary: The Chargers QB is expected to be full-go for Week 1 despite the tweak.
